dependencies: Reliance on delivery professionals in Ukraine and Belarus
Dependence on banking systems in emerging markets
Concentration of delivery personnel in specific geographies
risks: War in Ukraine disrupting operations and personnel
Banking instability in Ukraine, Belarus, Kazakhstan, Georgia, Armenia, India, Argentina, and Uzbekistan
Sanctions and counter-sanctions affecting operations in Belarus and Russia
Internet communications blocked by clients for Ukraine and Belarus locations
Geographic concentration risk in delivery centers
Reliance on visas for cross-border staffing

regulatory_risks: GDPR and UK GDPR compliance requirements
California Consumer Privacy Act and California Privacy Rights Act
Data privacy regulations in multiple jurisdictions
U.S. policy changes on offshore outsourcing
Belarus restrictions on dividend distributions to U.S. shareholders
Potential liquidation of subsidiaries in Belarus and Ukraine for non-compliance
Belarus government seizure authority over assets owned by unfriendly foreign states
EU-U.S. Trans-Atlantic Data Privacy Framework uncertainty
Pillar Two global minimum tax of 15%
Climate change and ESG disclosure regulations

sanction_risks: Sanctions against Belarus officials, individuals, and industries
Sanctions affecting banking transactions in the region
Sanctions limiting cash movement and foreign currency exchange
